panels.title: Start the orbit
panels.description: A spiral flow builds progressive commitment with each transition.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 26% 20%, rgba(166, 90, 255, 0.5) 0%, rgba(166, 90, 255, 0.11) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 74% 18%, rgba(0, 233, 255, 0.46) 0%, rgba(0, 233, 255, 0.1) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(140deg, #060916 0%, #1a1952 48%, #142b57 100%)

panels.title: Frame the tension
panels.description: Expose the core challenge users want solved.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 86% 28%, rgba(255, 77, 181, 0.42) 0%, rgba(255, 77, 181, 0.1) 36%, transparent 64%), radial-gradient(circle at 16% 78%, rgba(99, 120, 255, 0.4) 0%, rgba(99, 120, 255, 0.09) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(150deg, #0b0617 0%, #2b1145 52%, #17294e 100%)

panels.title: Reveal the method
panels.description: Introduce your unique process and why it wins.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 20%, rgba(69, 255, 209, 0.36) 0%, rgba(69, 255, 209, 0.08) 34%, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 82%, rgba(101, 80, 255, 0.46) 0%, rgba(101, 80, 255, 0.11) 34%, transparent 62%), linear-gradient(132deg, #04080f 0%, #0f2a3a 48%, #1f1d56 100%)

panels.title: Demonstrate proof
panels.description: Validate with outcomes, benchmarks and visual evidence.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 80% 22%, rgba(255, 157, 66, 0.42) 0%, rgba(255, 157, 66, 0.09) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 20% 84%, rgba(255, 72, 232, 0.38) 0%, rgba(255, 72, 232, 0.08) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(148deg, #0a0913 0%, #222a58 50%, #3f1454 100%)

panels.title: Reduce friction
panels.description: Answer objections before users ask them.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 70% 18%, rgba(111, 231, 255, 0.42) 0%, rgba(111, 231, 255, 0.1) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 30% 82%, rgba(203, 92, 255, 0.38) 0%, rgba(203, 92, 255, 0.09) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(134deg, #070a14 0%, #1b2f55 48%, #25134d 100%)

panels.title: Build urgency
panels.description: Make the cost of inaction obvious and immediate.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 22% 16%, rgba(255, 121, 121, 0.42) 0%, rgba(255, 121, 121, 0.1) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 78% 80%, rgba(126, 94, 255, 0.4) 0%, rgba(126, 94, 255, 0.09) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(150deg, #090811 0%, #2a1b4d 50%, #132548 100%)

panels.title: Convert at peak intent
panels.description: Close the spiral with one decisive action and zero distraction.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 14%, rgba(109, 157, 255, 0.45) 0%, rgba(109, 157, 255, 0.1) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 84%, rgba(201, 74, 255, 0.42) 0%, rgba(201, 74, 255, 0.09) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(180deg, #050914 0%, #13244b 46%, #2a1451 100%)
